OptionDisplayName.SourceString: Show Objective Pulse to Friendly Players
OptionDisplayName.LocalizedString: Show Objective Pulse to Friendly Players

OptionDescription.SourceString: An Objective Pulse will appear to Friendly Players indicating the location of the device in relation to the Player.
OptionDescription.LocalizedString: An Objective Pulse will appear to Friendly Players indicating the location of the device in relation to the Player.
